metadata.title: Local REST API & MCP Server
metadata.description: Local REST API & MCP Server Localization & Tweaks
metadata.author: ouroboros

ast.name: error
ast.source: ACTION NEEDED: require('iconv-lite').extendNodeEncodings() is not supported in your version of Node
ast.target: 需要操作：require('iconv-lite').extendNodeEncodings() 在您当前的 Node 版本中不受支持

ast.name: error
ast.source: Iconv-lite warning: decode()-ing strings is deprecated. Refer to https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding
ast.target: Iconv-lite 警告：decode() 解码字符串已不推荐使用。请参阅 https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding

ast.name: error
ast.source: iconv-lite warning: javascript files use encoding different from utf-8. See https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Javascript-source-file-encodings for more info.
ast.target: iconv-lite 警告：JavaScript 文件使用的编码不同于 UTF-8。更多信息请参阅 https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Javascript-source-file-encodings。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables a non-encrypted (HTTP) server on the port designated below.  By default this plugin requires a secure HTTPS connection, but in safe environments you may turn on the non-encrypted server to simplify interacting with the API. Interactions with the API will still require the API key shown above.  Under no circumstances is it recommended that you expose this service to the internet, especially if you turn on this feature!
ast.target: 在下面指定的端口上启用非加密（HTTP）服务器。默认情况下，此插件需要安全的 HTTPS 连接，但在安全的环境中，您可以开启非加密服务器以简化与 API 的交互。与 API 的交互仍然需要上述显示的 API 密钥。无论何种情况，都不建议将此服务暴露到互联网，尤其是在启用此功能时！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Pressing this button will cause your certificate,
        private key, public key, and API key to be regenerated.
        This settings panel will be closed when you press this.
ast.target:
按下此按钮将重新生成您的证书、
        私钥、公钥和 API 密钥。
        当您按下此按钮时，设置面板将被关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Pressing this button will cause your certificate,
        private key,  and public key to be re-generated, but your API key will remain unchanged. 
        This settings panel will be closed when you press this.
ast.target:
按下此按钮将重新生成您的证书、
        私钥和公钥，但您的 API 密钥保持不变。
        当您按下此按钮时，设置面板将被关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Pressing this button will reset this plugin's
        settings to defaults.
        This settings panel will be closed when you press this.
ast.target:
按下此按钮将把此插件的
        设置重置为默认值。
        当您按下此按钮时，设置面板将被关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Advanced settings are dangerous and may make your environment less secure.
ast.target: 高级设置存在风险，可能会降低环境的安全性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
This controls whether the HTTPS server is enabled.  You almost certainly want to leave this switch in its default state ('on'),
          but may find it useful to turn this switch off for
          troubleshooting.
ast.target:
此控制是否启用 HTTPS 服务器。您几乎肯定想保持此开关的默认状态（“开启”），
          但在故障排除时可能需要将其关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This configures the port on which your REST API will listen for HTTPS connections.  It is recommended that you leave this port with its default setting as tools integrating with this API may expect the default port to be in use.  Under no circumstances is it recommended that you expose this service directly to the internet.
ast.target: 此项配置您的 REST API 监听 HTTPS 连接的端口。建议保持该端口的默认设置，因为集成此 API 的工具可能会期望使用默认端口。无论何种情况，都不建议将此服务直接暴露到互联网。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
List of extra hostnames to add
          to your certificate's \`subjectAltName\` field.
          One hostname per line.
          You must click the "Re-generate Certificates" button above after changing this value
          for this to have an effect.  This is useful for
          situations in which you are accessing Obsidian
          from a hostname other than the host on which
          it is running.
ast.target:
List of extra hostnames to add
          to your certificate's \`subjectAltName\` field.
          One hostname per line.
          You must click the "Re-generate Certificates" button above after changing this value
          for this to have an effect.  This is useful for
          situations in which you are accessing Obsidian
          from a hostname other than the host on which
          it is running.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, logs server startup messages and a one-line access log entry for every request to the browser console.
ast.target: 启用后，会将服务器启动信息以及每个请求的一行访问日志记录到浏览器控制台。

ast.target: 本地 REST API 与 MCP 服务器

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 通过 REST 访问方式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 通过 MCP 访问方式

ast.name: warn
ast.source: these parameters are deprecated, see docs for addKeyword
ast.target: 这些参数已弃用，请参阅 addKeyword 文档

ast.name: warn
ast.source: keywords option as map is deprecated, pass array
ast.target: keywords 选项作为映射已弃用，请传入数组

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support records in schemas! Try an array of key-value pairs instead.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持模式中的记录！请改用键值对数组。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: OpenAI may not support schemas with unions as roots! Try wrapping it in an object property.
ast.target: 警告：OpenAI 可能不支持以联合类型为根的模式！请尝试将其包装在对象属性中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Tool registration will proceed, but this may cause compatibility issues.
ast.target: 工具注册将继续，但可能导致兼容性问题。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Consider updating the tool name to conform to the MCP tool naming standard.
ast.target: 请考虑更新工具名称，以符合 MCP 工具命名标准。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: See SEP: Specify Format for Tool Names (https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/issues/986) for more details.
ast.target: 请参阅 SEP：Specify Format for Tool Names（https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/issues/986）了解更多细节。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to read the daily note template
ast.target: 读取每日笔记模板失败

ast.name: description
ast.source: Meta-schema for $data reference (JSON AnySchema extension proposal)
ast.target: 用于 $data 引用的元模式（JSON AnySchema 扩展提案）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Full OpenAPI specification for the Obsidian Local REST API. Contains complete request/response schemas, parameter descriptions, and usage examples for every endpoint.
ast.target: Obsidian 本地 REST API 的完整 OpenAPI 规范。包含所有端点的完整请求/响应模式、参数描述以及使用示例。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate is not valid yet or has expired.
ast.target: 证书尚未生效或已过期。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate has an unsupported critical extension.
ast.target: 证书具有不受支持的关键扩展。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate keyUsage or basicConstraints conflict or indicate that the certificate is not a CA. If the certificate is the only one in the chain or isn't the first then the certificate must be a valid CA.
ast.target: 证书的 keyUsage 或 basicConstraints 冲突，或表明该证书不是 CA。如果该证书是链中的唯一证书或不是第一张，则该证书必须是有效的 CA。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate basicConstraints indicates the certificate is not a CA.
ast.target: 证书的 basicConstraints 表明该证书不是 CA。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 证书的 basicConstraints 路径长度约束被违反。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 应用程序拒绝了该证书。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected message. Received TLS record out of order.
ast.target: 意外的消息。收到的 TLS 记录顺序错误。

ast.name: message
ast.source: TLS version change is disallowed during renegotiation.
ast.target: 在重新协商期间不允许更改 TLS 版本。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 不兼容的 TLS 版本。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid Certificate message. Message too short.
ast.target: 无效的证书消息。消息太短。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid key parameters. Only RSA is supported.
ast.target: 无效的密钥参数。仅支持 RSA。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的 ServerHelloDone 消息。长度错误。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No server certificate provided. Not enough security.
ast.target: 未提供服务器证书。安全性不足。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 收到无效的 ChangeCipherSpec 消息。

ast.name: message
ast.target: Finished 消息中的 verify_data 无效。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Could not decrypt record or bad MAC.
ast.target: 无法解密记录或 MAC 错误。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Cannot initiate handshake as a server.
ast.target: 作为服务器无法发起握手。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected block-seq-ind on same line with key
ast.target: 同一行的键出现意外的块序列缩进

ast.name: message
ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values
ast.target: 必须等于允许的值之一

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match a schema in anyOf
ast.target: 必须匹配 anyOf 中的任意模式

ast.name: message
ast.source: must match exactly one schema in oneOf
ast.target: 必须恰好匹配 oneOf 中的一个模式

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的 Base64 字符串

ast.name: message
ast.source: Not Acceptable: Client must accept text/event-stream
ast.target: 不可接受：客户端必须接受 text/event-stream

ast.name: message
ast.source: Conflict: Only one SSE stream is allowed per session
ast.target: 冲突：每个会话仅允许一个 SSE 流

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的事件 ID 格式

ast.name: message
ast.source: Conflict: Stream already has an active connection
ast.target: 冲突：流已存在活动连接

ast.name: message
ast.source: Not Acceptable: Client must accept both application/json and text/event-stream
ast.target: 不可接受：客户端必须同时接受 application/json 和 text/event-stream

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unsupported Media Type: Content-Type must be application/json
ast.target: 不支持的媒体类型：Content-Type 必须为 application/json

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的请求：服务器已初始化

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid Request: Only one initialization request is allowed
ast.target: 无效请求：只允许一次初始化请求

ast.name: message
ast.target: 错误的请求：服务器未初始化

ast.name: message
ast.source: Bad Request: Mcp-Session-Id header is required
ast.target: 错误的请求：需要 Mcp-Session-Id 头部

ast.name: message
ast.source: Bad Request: Mcp-Session-Id header must be a single value
ast.target: 错误的请求：Mcp-Session-Id 头部必须是单一值

ast.name: message
ast.source: Deleting a targeted section via URL is not supported. Use PATCH with Operation: replace and an empty body instead.
ast.target: 不支持通过 URL 删除特定部分。请改用 PATCH，操作为 replace 且正文为空。

ast.target: 可在以下位置找到有关可用 API 端点的完整文档

ast.name: text

ast.target: 您可以通过以下端点连接到 MCP 服务器：

ast.source: be configured as a trusted certificate authority.  See
ast.target: 可配置为受信任的证书颁发机构。请参阅

ast.name: text

ast.target: 其他 MCP 客户端的配置示例可在以下位置找到

ast.name: text
ast.source: You must re-generate your certificate below by pressing the "Re-generate Certificates" button below in order to connect securely to this API.
ast.target: 您必须通过点击下面的“Re-generate Certificates”按钮重新生成证书，以便安全连接此 API。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You should re-generate your certificate below by pressing the "Re-generate Certificates" button below in order to continue to connect securely to this API.
ast.target: 您应该通过点击下面的“Re-generate Certificates”按钮重新生成证书，以继续安全连接此 API。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your certificate was generated using earlier standards than are currently used by Obsidian Local REST API & MCP Server. Some systems or tools may not accept your certificate with its current configuration, and re-generating your certificate may improve compatibility with such tools.  To re-generate your certificate, press the "Re-generate Certificates" button below.
ast.target: 您的证书是使用早于 Obsidian Local REST API 与 MCP 服务器当前标准的旧版标准生成的。某些系统或工具可能不接受当前配置的证书，重新生成证书可能会提升与这些工具的兼容性。要重新生成证书，请点击下面的“Re-generate Certificates”按钮。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
The settings below are potentially dangerous and
          are intended for use only by people who know what
          they are doing. Do not change any of these settings if
          you do not understand what that setting is used for
          and what security impacts changing that setting will have.
ast.target:
以下设置可能具有危险性，
          仅供了解其作用的人员使用。若您不明白该设置的用途以及更改该设置可能带来的安全影响，请勿更改这些设置。
